title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Kanpur

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Kanpur
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!
